description: Detects potential memory leaks in JavaScript: addEventListener without corresponding removeEventListener, setInterval return value not stored (cannot be cleared). Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes with identifier function (cannot distinguish addEventListener from other calls or verify removeEventListener presence elsewhere in the file without #match? predicate support). All direct function calls flagged -- higher false positive rate than Rust version.

flag.message: Direct function call detected -- verify addEventListener calls have corresponding removeEventListener and setInterval return values are stored for later clearInterval
